g.text: Close loops and clean the system
2 items not uploaded to cloud yet
- Execute and review loops visible in nav
1. Import this SVG into a new Figma page.
2. Ungroup each phone frame and convert to components.
3. Adjust spacing/typography with your target iOS grid.
4. Replace placeholder text with real test scenarios.
Prepared for direct import to Figma as an editable starting sketch board.
